name: Fumio Kishida
title: Prime Minister of Japan

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Cornerstone US-Japan alliance and shared security architecture
Historical tensions and East China Sea territorial disputes
Direct missile threat from DPRK and abduction issue

biography: Fumio Kishida represents Japan's cautious, institution-respecting political tradition, navigating a dangerous neighborhood while maintaining pacifist constitutional norms. His ISFJ temperament drives a duty-bound, detail-oriented approach that prioritizes stability and alliance management over bold unilateral action. He pursues incremental defense buildup while deepening economic ties across Asia.
